notes:
Tried disabling FSR, tried Proton 8, 9, Experiemental and Hotfix, and GE 24. Before I could try anything else I was locked out by Denuvo.
While troubleshooting the freezing issue I had to restart the game a lot, triggering Denuvo lockout for 24 hours. I'm just gonna refund the game, fair warning, this game aint "Platinum" on general PCs, only Steamdeck.
